identity.name: NestLedger
identity.mission: A shared home expense & shopping manager that feels like a calm, organized home, not a spreadsheet.

rules: Use 'w-[48%]' for standard square cards (1 column)
Always use 'flex-row flex-wrap justify-between' for the grid container
Cards must have 'bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-card' styling
Content inside cards should be aligned 'flex-col justify-between' to fill space

components_to_build.name: TheBentoCard
components_to_build.description: Base container for all dashboard items. Supports 'variant' prop for different sizes (span-1, span-2).

components_to_build.name: ModernButton
components_to_build.description: Pill-shaped, tactile button with scale animation on press.

components_to_build.name: AmountInput
components_to_build.description: Large text input for entering currency. Auto-formats with 'Rs.' prefix.

components_to_build.name: ProgressBar
components_to_build.description: Minimal rounded progress bar for budget tracking. Green -> Yellow -> Red based on %.

components_to_build.name: AvatarGroup
components_to_build.description: Overlapping circles of user avatars (or initials) for member lists.

components_to_build.name: ShoppingItem
components_to_build.description: Swipeable row item with checkbox. Strikes through text when bought.

universal_guidelines: Use 'SafeAreaView' from 'react-native-safe-area-context' for all screen containers.
All interactive elements must have 'hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }}' if small.
Use 'KeyboardAvoidingView' with behavior 'padding' on iOS and 'height' on Android for forms.
Never use generic 'gray' colors. Use the 'stone' or 'zinc' palette defined in theme.
Animations: Use 'react-native-reanimated' for layout transitions (e.g., adding/removing items).
setup_instructions: npx expo install nativewind tailwindcss react-native-reanimated react-native-safe-area-context expo-router expo-linking expo-constants expo-status-bar expo-image expo-font @supabase/supabase-js @react-native-async-storage/async-storage lucide-react-native clsx tailwind-merge zustand date-fns react-native-url-polyfill
Configure babel.config.js for NativeWind and Reanimated
Create tailwind.config.js with custom colors and fonts

database_schema.invitations: id (uuid), profile_id (uuid), invited_email (text), invite_token (text), status (text), created_at (timestamp)
database_schema.budget_plans: id (uuid), profile_id (uuid), name (text), total_amount (numeric), start_date (date), end_date (date), created_by (uuid), created_at (timestamp)
database_schema.expenses: id (uuid), plan_id (uuid), profile_id (uuid), title (text), category (text), price (numeric), date (timestamp), added_by (uuid), created_at (timestamp)
database_schema.buy_list_items: id (uuid), profile_id (uuid), name (text), quantity (text), category (text), added_by (uuid), is_bought (boolean), bought_by (uuid), bought_at (timestamp), created_at (timestamp)
database_schema.notifications: id (uuid), profile_id (uuid), user_id (uuid), message (text), type (text), is_read (boolean), created_at (timestamp)
